name: Teasing Oni
outcome: While keeping [TargetName] in a powerful hold, [AttackerName] sensually rubs her luscious breasts against [TargetName]'s back while also whispering sweet nothings into [TargetHisOrHer] ear, making [TargetName] shiver with every little sensation [TargetHeOrShe] feels.
miss: While keeping [TargetName] in a powerful hold, [AttackerName] sensually rubs her luscious breasts against [TargetName]'s back while also whispering sweet nothings into [TargetHisOrHer] ear. But [TargetHeOrShe] manages to ignore the sensual teasing!
